sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this simulation title

special_mechanics.name: Mech Physical Simulation
special_mechanics.description: Core mechanic involving physical simulation of BattleMech movement, heat management, and damage systems. Includes torso/leg independent control modes and real-time first-person combat.

physics_values.heat_buildup_system: Accumulates from weapon fire; can cause ammunition explosions, limb loss, actuator damage, and fusion engine detonation
physics_values.control_modes: Range from basic point-and-shoot to advanced independent leg/torso management

special_mechanics.name: Mech Damage System
special_mechanics.description: Dynamic damage model affecting mech functionality including limb loss and component destruction

physics_values.damage_types: Limb loss, actuator damage, ammunition detonation, fusion engine catastrophic failure

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative. Wikipedia source provides gameplay overview but does not document specific numerical movement parameters, gravity values, or physics constants. Game is a vehicle simulation with emphasis on tactical BattleMech physics rather than character platformer movement. No concrete movement metrics available in provided documentation.
